description: Address v2 review issues: (1) Add quota feedback error banners to CRUD pages when storage.create/update returns success=false, (2) Fix import function in settings to distinguish parse vs write errors and use safeSetItem, (3) Optimize calendar page by pre-computing events with useMemo into a Map keyed by day.
steps: Add error state and error banner to all CRUD pages (transactions, budgets, income, savings, bills, debts, net-worth) that shows when a create/update operation returns { success: false }.

Fix the import function in settings/page.tsx to use the storage layer's safeSetItem, distinguish parse errors from write errors, show appropriate error messages, and do pre-validation of approximate total size before writing.
Optimize calendar/page.tsx by pre-computing all events for the visible month using useMemo into a Map<number, CalendarEvent[]>, then look up from the map when rendering each cell.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD pages show a red error banner when a storage write fails (success === false)
Settings import function distinguishes parse errors from write errors and shows appropriate messages
Settings import uses safeSetItem from the storage layer instead of raw localStorage.setItem
Calendar pre-computes events for all days in a single useMemo pass and stores in a Map
Calendar cell rendering looks up events from the pre-computed map instead of calling getEventsForDay per cell
bun run build completes without errors
